AVGO.moat_summary: Deep hyperscaler relationships. Custom ASIC design is irreplaceable once embedded — hyperscalers design multi-year chip roadmaps around AVGO.
AVGO.next_catalyst: Q3 FY2026: custom ASIC pipeline + AI rev guide
AVGO.name: Broadcom

BWXT.early_entry_signal: Market prices BWXT as a cyclical industrial compounder. Correct read: legally mandated defense utility with 2.3x annual revenue in contracted backlog already signed. The $8.65B is not speculative — it is executed contracts. SMR upside is free optionality on top. The narrative says nuclear is speculative; the data says this specific company has revenue pre-sold through 2027.
BWXT.moat_summary: Legal monopoly. Federal law requires US Navy nuclear propulsion components from BWXT — no substitute, no foreign alternative permitted. Zero AI disruption risk. Not a speculative SMR play — mandated defense infrastructure with revenue pre-sold.
BWXT.invalidation: Defense budget cut >20% to naval nuclear programs. Quarterly revenue falls below $870M for two consecutive quarters — signals backlog conversion is slowing.
BWXT.next_catalyst: Additional naval nuclear contract awards throughout 2026. Q2 and Q3 2026 earnings confirming 60%+ backlog-to-revenue conversion.
BWXT.name: BWX Technologies

KNSL.early_entry_signal: Nobody talks about insurance in an AI bull market. KNSL is down 24% with no deterioration in underwriting quality — the dislocation is narrative, not data. This is precisely the Buffett entry template: boring business, down for sentiment reasons, best-in-class economics compounding at 15%+ for a decade, high FCF, no AI disruption risk. The crowd will never arrive here during an AI bull market — which is exactly when you buy it.
KNSL.moat_summary: Proprietary actuarial data and technology-first underwriting culture built over 15+ years of loss history. 77.4% combined ratio cannot be replicated by a new entrant — it requires 15 years of data discipline. Low expense ratio from technology-driven operations. The moat compounds every year the database grows.
KNSL.invalidation: Combined ratio rises above 85% for two consecutive quarters — signals competitive pressure has eroded underwriting standards. Premium growth falls below 0% YoY — structural market share loss.
KNSL.next_catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings: combined ratio confirmation below 80% proves underwriting quality intact. E&S market pricing stabilization data from industry reports.
KNSL.name: Kinsale Capital

NVDA.moat_summary: CUDA software ecosystem. 10+ year developer lock-in. No competitor has matched the full hardware + software stack.
NVDA.name: NVIDIA

CLS.early_entry_signal: Druckenmiller-style early entry: same AI infrastructure demand as AVGO, but no major fund showed significant new CLS position in Q1 2026 13F filings. +53% revenue growth with $19B FY guide raised — the crowd hasn't arrived. Trades at 18x forward PE while AVGO trades at 32x for the same demand tailwind. The mispricing exists because CLS is classified as a boring contract manufacturer, not an AI infrastructure name.
CLS.moat_summary: Deep hyperscaler manufacturing integration — multi-year supply agreements with design-to-manufacturing integration create switching costs. CLS is embedded in hardware design cycles, not just assembly. Specialized clean-room manufacturing capability.
CLS.invalidation: Hyperscaler AI capex cut >15%. Loss of a top-2 customer relationship disclosed in earnings. Revenue growth drops below 20% for two consecutive quarters — signals the AI hardware manufacturing boom is plateauing.
CLS.next_catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings: FY guide raised further above $19B confirms AI hardware demand acceleration. Major analyst initiation at bulge-bracket bank would force institutional recognition.
CLS.name: Celestica

APP.moat_summary: Network effects in ad data. The more advertisers use it, the better the model gets. Classic flywheel.
APP.next_catalyst: Q2 2026 AXON revenue + connected TV expansion
APP.name: AppLovin

PLTR.moat_summary: Government contract stickiness. Security clearance requirements create near-impossible switching.
PLTR.next_catalyst: Q2 2026 AIP commercial + US gov contract pipeline
PLTR.name: Palantir

VST.moat_summary: Nuclear plants are irreplaceable 40-year assets. Cannot build new ones quickly. AI data center demand creates structural pricing power.
VST.name: Vistra Energy

VRT.moat_summary: Deep data center integration — cooling systems are designed into facilities, not swapped.
VRT.next_catalyst: Q2 2026 data center cooling order rate + margins
VRT.name: Vertiv

CCJ.moat_summary: Tier-1 uranium mines with 20+ year reserves. Permitting for new mines takes decades.
CCJ.name: Cameco
